name: Super-Duper Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the cooking oil and Quick Mix.
2. Add sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg to the mixture, stirring until combined.
3. Stir in vanilla extract and beaten egg.
4. Gradually add milk or water, mixing until the batter is smooth.
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, frying until golden brown on both sides.
7. Remove doughnuts from oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
8. Brush with vanilla glaze before serving.
